Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “The One Big Thing” tool. This tool will help you realize that the thing that scares you the
most, is the dragon you have to slay. Let’s face it head on and find out what your “one thing” is that can solve all your biggest fears and issues. This tool
has a compounding effect that can change everything in the blink of an eye.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
At the bottom of the “One Big Thing” hourglass, write down the problems or worries you are having because of the thing you fear most
in life.
Write down possible solutions that could solve the problem you are so desperately trying to fix.
Focus long and hard and discover the One Big Thing that can solve all of the problems or worries you are having in regards to your
biggest fear. The one thing that could help you slay the dragon of fear if you accomplished it. Write down that one big thing.
Write down what you will have to consistently do to make sure that one thing stays true and you can accomplish it confidently.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
